job: turn a creator capsule into a compact process zine that can be printed, folded, annotated, and handed to collaborators while keeping intent, proof, blocked inputs, and remix rules visible

zine_contract.page_model: one 1684x1191 fixed-canvas sheet with six numbered panels; print/export stays in the existing DASH print path before any booklet tooling enters the repo
panel_sequence: idea: one sentence that names the artifact job
capsule: source memory and visual grammar
proof: commands that must run before handoff
remix: safe mutations that keep proof intact
handoff: collaborator notes and next artifact route
zine_contract.fold_rule: fold as a lightweight desk zine or use flat as a process worksheet; panel order keeps idea, proof, boundary, and remix visible without needing a new app shell
zine_contract.print_rule: render with bun print:render at 1684x1191 and inspect the single PDF sheet before sharing
zine_contract.accessibility_note: large panel numbers, high-contrast ink, and plain text labels make the zine usable as a readable handoff sheet, not just decoration

zine_grammar.layout: six asymmetrical editorial panels on a warm paper sheet, with fold rules, proof rail, and remix stamps
zine_grammar.type: oversized serif panel numbers, compact mono route labels, and readable sans process notes
zine_grammar.color: warm paper, carbon ink, blue proof marks, green remix annotations, and amber fold guides
zine_grammar.motion: static print-first artifact now; future motion may reveal panels in order but must preserve the one-sheet proof contract

allowed: DASH print and fixed-canvas layout grammar
blocked: raw creator media or generated media
API keys, cookies, tokens, passwords, secrets
account screenshots, provider logs, or client analytics

retention: selected PDF/process-surface mutation retained as example plus script and CI gate; do not promote a booklet or zine package primitive until at least two printable remix surfaces prove the same panel contract
